response.justification: The candidate has well over the required 6 years of full-stack experience, with recent, directly relevant work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and AWS, plus current hands-on AI-agent development (MCP code generators and agentic tooling). Demonstrated testing craft is exceptional — TDD practice, authoring test frameworks and runners, and teaching testing courses — and experience spans high-throughput backend systems, Kubernetes deployments, and end-to-end product delivery. Gaps are mostly in specific named tools (Nest.js, Kotlin, Python, Playwright/Vitest) rather than in underlying capability.
strengths: 13+ years full-stack experience with recent TypeScript/Node.js/React product work and AI-agent tooling (MCP)
Deep testing and software-craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, authored test libraries, taught testing workshops
Breadth across backend performance (high-QPS microservices), cloud/containerization (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes), and databases (MongoDB, SQL)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, a core framework in the primary stack
Kotlin and Python are not listed despite the multi-language requirement (Java exposure appears limited)
Significant career investment in DLang, a niche ecosystem, with unclear depth in the modern React/Vitest toolchain specifically

key_factors.factor: AI agent development experience (MCP, agentic frameworks)
